Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Trial Dates
Off Calendar Oct-03-2023 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Trial Date, Declaration Of Kelsea A. Carbajal In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Aug-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS DIGNITY HEALTH DBA MERCY MEDICAL CENTER MERCED, NADIR ADAM, M.D., FOUNDATION PHYSICIAN MEDICAL GROUP, INC.'s Motion To Vacate Trial Date

Defendants Dignity Health DBA Mercy Medical Center Merced, Nadir Adam and Foundation Physician Medical Group, Inc.'s motion to vacate trial dates and stay proceedings pending Plaintiff's appeal of the court's order granting summary judgment in favor of Defendant Nadir Adam, which is unopposed, is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. The stay request is granted, and the court stays proceedings pending Plaintiff's appeal of the court's order granting summary judgment in favor of Defendant Nadir Adam. The motion to vacate trial dates is denied without prejudice to presentation of the same request to the Presiding Judge in Department 206, who has exclusive authority over trial calendars for cases such as this. (See L.R.S.F. 6.0.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
